title: Ahtna, Inc. Board Member Karen Linnell Appointed by Governor Walker to the Alaska Board of Game
summary: Congratulations to Ahtna Board Member Karen Linnell on being appointed by the Governor to the Alaska Board of Game! A lifelong subsistence hunter and fisher, Karen Linnell has over a decade of experience working on fish and game management issues in our region. She has also served on the Copper Rive...

title: Chugach Alaska Corporation Board Chair Receives YWCA Alaska Women of Achievement Award
summary: Chugach has been an avid supporter of the annual ceremony for several years, which pays tribute to women such as Buretta who give of their time and energy to make our state a better place.
